calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-12-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-06-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-06-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Gemma O'Keefe, counsel for James Murphy and David Kesler, Co-Petitioners, appearing by ZOOM.

The court inquires regarding the Notice issues as to Lorane Akzam. Ms. O'Keefe reports that a WAIVER OF FIFTEEN (15) DAY NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR PROBATE AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT OF RECEIPT OF NOTICE OF PETITION TO ADMINISTER ESTATE has been filed. Clerk confirms that the waiver has been filed. The court reviews the waiver and is satisfied with the filing.

There being no appearance to object, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated NOV-17-2020 is admitted to probate. James Murphy and David Kesler are appointed as the Executors of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court.

Status on close of estate is set for APR-06-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by MAR-23-2022 the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Robert Woods; Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. Not Reported.
